title: solanum neesianum
intro: Solanum neesianum, also known as the Nees' nightshade, is a species of flowering plant in the family Solanaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful for treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Solanum neesianum include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and supporting the immune system. The plant can be prepared into various herbal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
